info.title: Sigma Dashboard
info.summary: Internal ops dashboard API for the Viper-tracked team.
info.description:
The internal API behind the **Sigma Dashboard** — attendance, daily reports &
performance, goals, and project condition for the Viper-tracked team.

### Conventions
- **Base path:** every endpoint lives under `/api/v1`.
- **Envelope:** every response is `{ "data": <payload|null>, "meta": {…}, "error": <null|{code,message,details}> }`.
  On success `error` is `null`; on failure `data` is `null` and the HTTP status is non-2xx.
- **Time:** datetimes are ISO-8601 with offset; dates are `YYYY-MM-DD` (the shift day, Asia/Tashkent).

### Authentication
Two schemes (see the **Authorize** button):
- **AdminBearer** — `POST /auth/login` returns an `access_token`; send it as
  `Authorization: Bearer <token>` on every read/admin endpoint. Tokens expire (default 8h).
- **ViperToken** — the ingest agent writes via `/viper/*` using the shared `X-Viper-Token`
  header (a bearer of the same secret also works).

### Errors
`401` missing/invalid credentials · `403` wrong subject · `404` not found ·
`422` validation (details in `error.details.errors`). All errors use the envelope above.

post.description:
Exchange an admin username + password for a bearer JWT.

Returns `data.access_token` (send it as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`) and `data.expires_at`.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Aggregated home view for a shift day: tonight's attendance, the weekly lateness
summary, the count of missing reports, at-risk goals, and stale project topics.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description: The attendance record for each person on the given shift day, ordered by roster.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
A rows=people × cols=days grid over `[from, to]`. Days with no record return a
`missing` cell, so every person has a full, gap-free row.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Per-person counts of each attendance status (on_time / late / late_15 / no_show /
absent) for the Mon–Sun week beginning at `week_start`. `meta` echoes the resolved
`week_start`/`week_end`.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

patch.description:
Set the chase state (`none` / `needs_chase` / `chased` / `resolved`) on one
attendance record and return the updated record.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Each person's report for the given day — summary, extras, rating (1–4), missing
flag, source topic, and their active assignments.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Per-person performance over `[from, to]` — average rating, report completion rate (%),
missing days, and assignment count — sorted best-first (a leaderboard).

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
All goals (status derived from deadline), each with owner, progress, deadline,
next nudge, and the latest progress-log entry. Optionally filter by `status`.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Optional filter: active | overdue | done | paused.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Optional filter: active | overdue | done | paused.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Condition for each project topic — rolling summary, last activity, the open task
checklist, and the recent log timeline. Active projects only by default; pass
`include_archived=true` to also return archived ones (so they can be restored).

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

post.description: Create a new project topic and its condition. `topic_id` is auto-generated when omitted.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

409.description: A project with that topic_id already exists.

patch.description:
Patch a project's title, summary, task checklist, or active (archive) flag. Omitted
fields are left unchanged; archive sets `active=false` (hides it from the board).

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

delete.description: Permanently remove a project, its condition, and its logs. Referencing goals are detached.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

post.description: Append a timestamped log entry and bump the project's last activity. Returns the full project.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

delete.description: Remove a single log entry from a project. Returns the full project.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

post.description:
Idempotent upsert of one person's attendance for a shift day (keyed on person + date).
The person is created on first sight. The attendance status is derived server-side.

401.description: Missing or invalid `X-Viper-Token`.

post.description: Idempotent upsert of one person's daily report (keyed on person + date). Returns the report id.

401.description: Missing or invalid `X-Viper-Token`.

post.description:
Idempotent upsert of a goal (keyed on `slug`). `progress_log`, if present, is appended
as a timestamped log entry. Returns the resolved goal.

401.description: Missing or invalid `X-Viper-Token`.

post.description:
Idempotent upsert of a topic's rolling condition (keyed on `topic_id`) — summary,
last activity, and open items. Returns the resolved condition.

401.description: Missing or invalid `X-Viper-Token`.

post.description: Push current attendance to the configured HR sheet and return the sync run's status.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

get.description:
Spreadsheet title and, per tab, its dimensions, sample range, and a few sample rows —
used to verify the Google Sheet wiring before importing.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

400.description: Google Sheet could not be read or imported.

post.description:
Import rows from tabs with recognizable canonical headers into the dashboard, returning
counts of imported rows and any skipped tabs.

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

400.description: Google Sheet could not be read or imported.

post.summary: Import attendance from the HR sheet now
post.description:
Pull the wide `Sigma Attendnace` tab into the dashboard immediately — the same job the
daily 19:00 Asia/Tashkent auto-sync runs. Returns the recorded sync run (status + summary).

401.description: Missing or invalid admin bearer token.

Envelope.title: Envelope
Envelope.description:
Standard response envelope used by every endpoint.

On success, `data` holds the typed payload and `error` is `null`. On failure,
`data` is `null` and `error` carries a machine-readable `code` plus a `message`.
`meta` carries optional pagination/context (e.g. `week_start`, `week_end`).

IdResult.title: IdResult
IdResult.description: Minimal acknowledgement returned by write endpoints that only confirm an id.

ProjectCreate.title: ProjectCreate
ProjectCreate.description: Admin: create a new project. `topic_id` is auto-generated when omitted.

ProjectTask.title: ProjectTask
ProjectTask.description: A single checklist item for a project. `done` toggles completion.

ProjectUpdate.title: ProjectUpdate
ProjectUpdate.description: Admin: patch a project. Every field is optional; omitted fields are left unchanged.

SheetSyncResult.title: SheetSyncResult
SheetSyncResult.description: Outcome of a Google Sheet attendance sync run.

APIKeyHeader.description: Shared secret for the Viper ingest agent (SIGMA_VIPER_TOKEN).
APIKeyHeader.name: X-Viper-Token
